name: pharos-agent-center-skills
description: Portable Pharos Agent Center skills for AI agents on Pharos mainnet and Atlantic testnet.

skills.name: pharos-agent-toolkit
skills.summary: Diagnostics, portfolio summaries, allowance audits, NFT checks, and transaction debugging.

skills.name: pharos-nft-deployer
skills.summary: ERC721/ERC1155 deployment, image metadata preparation, IPFS helper, and mint/baseURI commands.

skills.name: pharos-batch-transfer
skills.summary: Native/ERC20 batch transfer and distributor workflows with dry-runs and confirmation gates.

skills.name: pharos-defi-position-checker
skills.summary: Registry-driven native, token, LP, staking, vault, and RealFi-style position reports.

skills.name: pharos-tx-history-summarizer
skills.summary: Explorer-backed wallet transaction history summaries, gas totals, counterparties, and latest activity.
